svg.title: DevOps Challenge Architecture Diagram
svg.desc: End-to-end architecture showing GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline deploying a Python Flask app to AWS EC2, with ECR for images, CloudWatch for monitoring, and ELK for local logging.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What goes in the GitHub repository?')
sendPrompt('Explain each stage of the GitHub Actions pipeline')
sendPrompt('What is Amazon ECR and how does it store Docker images?')
sendPrompt('What Terraform modules are used in this project?')
g.text: modules: vpc · security-groups · iam · ec2 · state in S3 + DynamoDB lock

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What runs inside the EC2 instance?')
sendPrompt('What ports does the security group allow?')
sendPrompt('What IAM policies are attached to the EC2 role?')
sendPrompt('What does CloudWatch monitor in this setup?')
sendPrompt('How does SNS alerting work with CloudWatch alarms?')
sendPrompt('How does the ELK stack work for local monitoring?')
sendPrompt('What endpoints does the Flask app expose?')
